title: taraxacum officinale subsp. gymnanthum
intro: Taraxacum officinale subsp. gymnanthum, commonly known as the lesser dandelion or Gymnander, is a subspecies of dandelion, a flowering plant in the sunflower family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects, as well as its ability to support liver function and act as a diuretic. The health benefits of Taraxacum officinale subsp. gymnanthum include reducing blood pressure, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Taraxacum officinale subsp. gymnanthum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil for its medicinal and health benefits.
